{{Quote|Stars know I would not be here if I were any good at anything else!|Kiel Charny|<ref name="JvS4" />}}
'''Kiel Charny''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. He was murdered by the Jedi initiate [[Darovit]], who subsequently defected to the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]].

==Biography==
[[File:KielCharny-JvS.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Kiel Charny]]

Charny was the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Handa]]; he became the lover of another of Handa's [[Padawan/Legends|students]], [[Githany]], who was only a year younger than Charny. Handa was outraged at their affair, and harshly rebuked them, one of many factors leading to Githany betraying the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and joining the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]. After General [[Valenthyne Farfalla]] had warned him about Githany's defection to save his life, Charny refused to follow his former lover on that path.

After completing his apprenticeship, Kiel Charny became a charismatic [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. During the [[Sixth Battle of Ruusan]], Charny and the Jedi forces came under attack by the Brotherhood forces, led by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan]] and Githany. After shooting down the [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] she was riding, he engaged Githany in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]]. He was unwilling to fight with all he had against his lost love, so she managed to [[Cho mai/Legends|sever]] his weapon hand. Seeing this as the ultimate Jedi weakness, [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] [[Darovit]] picked up Charny's discarded [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] him. The boy then joined the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] as Githany's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice.]] After his [[Death/Legends|death]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Charny]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]] was named for him.
